name: OpenSSF Scorecard: Token-Permissions
description: Verify that GitHub Actions workflows declare explicit least-privilege permissions for the GITHUB_TOKEN rather than using the default read-write scope. Overprivileged tokens in compromised workflows allow attackers to push malicious code, create releases, or exfiltrate secrets.
match: workflow files missing top-level permissions block or using write-all default
replacement: add 'permissions: read-all' at workflow level, grant specific write permissions only to jobs that need them
